'''Sojis''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Grand Imperial Navy]]. They served onboard the ''[[Bloodprice]]'' until its destruction at the hands of the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
